tools.name: get_case
tools.description: Get full case detail by caseId

tools.name: list_cases
tools.description: List case summaries with optional status and measure filter (measureId or measureName)

tools.name: get_run_summary
tools.description: Get run metadata and outcome counts by runId. If runId is omitted, returns latest run.

tools.name: list_measures
tools.description: List measures with optional lifecycle-status filter

tools.name: get_measure_version
tools.description: Get latest active measure detail by measureId or measureName

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List run summaries with optional measure filter

tools.name: explain_outcome
tools.description: Explain why a case was flagged using deterministic evidence fields
